mainEntity.name: Can a small local business actually rank for voice search, or is that only for big brands?

acceptedAnswer.text: You do not need a huge site to benefit from voice search, but you do need a real local presence that can be verified. Complete business profiles, consistent contact information, and location-specific pages matter more than having lots of content.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Small local businesses can win voice results when their business details are complete, consistent, and easy to understand. Big brands do not automatically outrank a well-optimized local listing.
